agent_output: {"domain_analysis":{"business_context":"A logistics platform managing parcel delivery lifecycle — from shipment creation through transit to final delivery — with weight-based pricing brackets.","bounded_context":"Shipment Management","ubiquitous_language":[{"term":"Shipment","definition":"A domain entity representing a parcel moving from a pickup address to a delivery address, progressing through defined lifecycle states."},{"term":"Pickup Address","definition":"The origin location where a parcel is collected. Required for shipment creation."},{"term":"Delivery Address","definition":"The destination location where a parcel is to be delivered. Required for shipment creation."},{"term":"Pending","definition":"The initial state of a shipment after creation, before it enters transit."},{"term":"In Transit","definition":"The state indicating a shipment is actively being transported from pickup to delivery address."},{"term":"Delivered","definition":"The terminal state of a shipment indicating successful delivery. Irreversible."},{"term":"Weight Bracket","definition":"A classification of shipments by weight that determines pricing tier: Standard, Heavy, or Freight."},{"term":"Standard","definition":"Weight bracket for shipments under 10 kg."},{"term":"Heavy","definition":"Weight bracket for shipments from 10 kg (inclusive) up to but not including 50 kg."},{"term":"Freight","definition":"Weight bracket for shipments of 50 kg (inclusive) and above, up to the 1000 kg maximum."}]},"business_rules":[{"id":"BR-1","rule":"A shipment requires both a pickup address and a delivery address at creation time.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"A shipment without both endpoints is logically meaningless — it represents a corrupted domain entity that cannot be fulfilled.","testable_assertion":"Any attempt to create a shipment missing either pickup address or delivery address must be rejected."},{"id":"BR-2","rule":"Shipment weight must be strictly positive (greater than zero).","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Zero or negative weight is physically impossible for a parcel and would corrupt weight-based pricing calculations.","testable_assertion":"Creating or updating a shipment with weight <= 0 must be rejected."},{"id":"BR-3","rule":"Shipment weight must not exceed 1000 kg.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"This is a hard physical/operational constraint — exceeding it likely violates vehicle load limits and safety regulations.","testable_assertion":"Creating or updating a shipment with weight > 1000 kg must be rejected."},{"id":"BR-4","rule":"A shipment in transit cannot transition back to pending.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"State regression from In Transit to Pending violates the forward-only lifecycle and would corrupt tracking, billing, and audit history.","testable_assertion":"Any attempt to set an In Transit shipment's state to Pending must be rejected."},{"id":"BR-5","rule":"A delivered shipment's state cannot be changed to any other state.","invariant":true,"invariant_justification":"Delivered is a terminal state — reversing it would corrupt proof-of-delivery records, billing finality, and downstream integrations.","testable_assertion":"Any attempt to change the state of a Delivered shipment must be rejected."},{"id":"BR-6","rule":"Weight bracket Standard applies when weight is in the range (0, 10) kg — strictly less than 10 kg.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"Pricing brackets are a business policy that could be adjusted by management without corrupting system integrity.","testable_assertion":"A shipment with weight 9.99 kg must be classified as Standard."},{"id":"BR-7","rule":"Weight bracket Heavy applies when weight is in the range [10, 50) kg — 10 kg inclusive, 50 kg exclusive.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"Pricing brackets are a business policy that could be adjusted by management.","testable_assertion":"A shipment with weight exactly 10 kg must be classified as Heavy; a shipment with weight 49.99 kg must also be classified as Heavy."},{"id":"BR-8","rule":"Weight bracket Freight applies when weight is in the range [50, 1000] kg — 50 kg inclusive, 1000 kg inclusive.","invariant":false,"invariant_justification":"Pricing brackets are a business policy that could be adjusted by management.","testable_assertion":"A shipment with weight exactly 50 kg must be classified as Freight; a shipment with weight 1000 kg must also be classified as Freight."}],"acceptance_criteria":[{"id":"AC-1","given":"A user provides a valid pickup address and delivery address","when":"They create a new shipment","then":"The shipment is created in Pending state"},{"id":"AC-2","given":"A user attempts to create a shipment without a pickup address","when":"The creation request is submitted","then":"The system rejects the request with a validation error"},{"id":"AC-3","given":"A user attempts to create a shipment without a delivery address","when":"The creation request is submitted","then":"The system rejects the request with a validation error"},{"id":"AC-4","given":"A shipment exists in Pending state","when":"It is transitioned to In Transit","then":"The shipment state becomes In Transit"},{"id":"AC-5","given":"A shipment exists in In Transit state","when":"An attempt is made to transition it back to Pending","then":"The system rejects the transition and the shipment remains In Transit"},{"id":"AC-6","given":"A shipment exists in In Transit state","when":"It is transitioned to Delivered","then":"The shipment state becomes Delivered"},{"id":"AC-7","given":"A shipment exists in Delivered state","when":"An attempt is made to change its state to any other state","then":"The system rejects the transition and the shipment remains Delivered"},{"id":"AC-8","given":"A shipment weight of 0 or negative value is provided","when":"The shipment is created or updated","then":"The system rejects the request with a validation error"},{"id":"AC-9","given":"A shipment weight exceeding 1000 kg is provided","when":"The shipment is created or updated","then":"The system rejects the request with a validation error"},{"id":"AC-10","given":"A shipment with weight 5 kg","when":"The weight bracket is determined","then":"The shipment is classified as Standard"},{"id":"AC-11","given":"A shipment with weight exactly 10 kg","when":"The weight bracket is determined","then":"The shipment is classified as Heavy"},{"id":"AC-12","given":"A shipment with weight 25 kg","when":"The weight bracket is determined","then":"The shipment is classified as Heavy"},{"id":"AC-13","given":"A shipment with weight exactly 50 kg","when":"The weight bracket is determined","then":"The shipment is classified as Freight"},{"id":"AC-14","given":"A shipment with weight 1000 kg","when":"The weight bracket is determined","then":"The shipment is classified as Freight"}],"edge_cases":[{"scenario":"Weight exactly at 10 kg boundary","expected_behavior":"Classified as Heavy (10 kg is the inclusive lower bound of the Heavy bracket)."},{"scenario":"Weight at 9.999... kg just below 10 kg","expected_behavior":"Classified as Standard."},{"scenario":"Weight exactly at 50 kg boundary","expected_behavior":"Classified as Freight (50 kg is the inclusive lower bound of the Freight bracket)."},{"scenario":"Weight at 49.999... kg just below 50 kg","expected_behavior":"Classified as Heavy."},{"scenario":"Weight exactly 1000 kg","expected_behavior":"Accepted and classified as Freight — this is the maximum allowed weight."},{"scenario":"Weight of 1000.01 kg","expected_behavior":"Rejected — exceeds the 1000 kg maximum."},{"scenario":"Attempting to transition a Pending shipment directly to Delivered","expected_behavior":"Spec does not explicitly define this transition. Likely invalid since it skips In Transit, but not explicitly stated. Noted in confidence."},{"scenario":"Attempting to transition a Delivered shipment to Delivered again","expected_behavior":"Rejected — Delivered is terminal, no state changes permitted including idempotent re-delivery."},{"scenario":"Pickup and delivery address are the same location","expected_behavior":"Spec does not prohibit this; both addresses are present so creation succeeds, but operationally questionable."}],"business_impact":{"financial":"Correct weight bracket classification directly determines charge tier. Misclassification at boundaries (10 kg, 50 kg) causes revenue leakage or customer overcharges.","operational":"Enforcing the forward-only state machine prevents rework, misdirected parcels, and audit trail corruption. Clear lifecycle states enable reliable tracking and SLA measurement.","user":"Customers receive predictable pricing based on transparent weight brackets. Immutable delivery status gives confidence in proof-of-delivery.","risk":"Low overall risk — the spec is explicit about boundaries and state transitions. Minor risk around undefined transitions (e.g., Pending → Delivered) that could surface as bugs if not addressed.","stakeholders_affected":[{"group":"Customers (Shippers)","impact":"Weight bracket classification determines what they pay. Clear state lifecycle provides shipment visibility."},{"group":"Operations / Dispatch","impact":"State machine enforcement prevents invalid workflow states. Weight limits ensure parcels fit operational capacity."},{"group":"Finance / Billing","impact":"Accurate bracket classification ensures correct invoicing. Terminal Delivered state anchors billing finality."},{"group":"Drivers / Couriers","impact":"Weight cap of 1000 kg ensures safe handling limits. Clear transit-to-delivered flow matches physical delivery process."}]},"confidence":{"level":82,"reasoning":"The spec is explicit about weight boundaries (inclusive/exclusive clearly stated), valid weight range, and state transition constraints. All pricing brackets are fully defined with no gaps. The only gap is the lack of a complete state transition matrix — specifically whether Pending → Delivered is allowed.","high_confidence_areas":["Weight validation rules (positive, max 1000 kg)","Weight bracket boundaries with explicit inclusive/exclusive definitions","Terminal nature of Delivered state","In Transit cannot regress to Pending","Shipment creation requires both addresses"],"low_confidence_areas":["Whether Pending → Delivered is a valid transition (not explicitly addressed)","Whether the same address for pickup and delivery is permitted","Whether weight can be modified after shipment creation or only at creation time"],"assumptions":["The only shipment states are Pending, In Transit, and Delivered","The valid lifecycle is Pending → In Transit → Delivered (linear progression)","Weight is set at creation and bracket classification is derived, not manually assigned","Addresses are non-empty strings; no specific format validation is described"]},"escalations":[],"rejection_reasons":[]}
